videos.headline: LSU Tigers vs. Ole Miss Rebels: Full Highlights
videos.description: LSU Tigers vs. Ole Miss Rebels: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU Tigers vs. Ole Miss Rebels: Full Highlights) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nick Anderson makes diving catch for LSU TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier's pass is swatted away from its intended target, only for Nick Anderson to come up with a nice play for the LSU touchdown vs. Ole Miss.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nick Anderson makes diving catch for LSU TD) 2025/09/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Lucas Carneiro kicks 25-yard field goal) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU forces Ole Miss to fumble at the goal line
videos.description: A.J. Haulcy punches the ball from Cayden Lee to force Ole Miss to fumble at the goal line, with Whit Weeks recovering the football for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU forces Ole Miss to fumble at the goal line ) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: End Zone! Kewan Lacy scores 15-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: End Zone! Kewan Lacy scores 15-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (End Zone! Kewan Lacy scores 15-yard rushing touchdown) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trinidad Chambliss connects with Cayden Lee for 2-yard TD
videos.description: Trinidad Chambliss finds Cayden Lee for a touchdown to pad Ole Miss' lead before the half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trinidad Chambliss connects for 2-yard TD pass) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wydett Williams Jr. picks off a pass for Ole Miss
videos.description: Wydett Williams Jr. intercepts Garrett Nussmeier's pass.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wydett Williams Jr. had an interception vs. LSU) 2025/09/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Damian Ramos kicks 40-yard field goal) 2025/09/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Damian Ramos makes 48-yard field goal) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Logan Diggs' 6-yard TD extends Ole Miss' lead over LSU
videos.description: Ole Miss holds onto its lead over LSU with a touchdown in the fourth thanks to Logan Diggs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Logan Diggs' 6-yard TD extends Ole Miss' lead over LSU ) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Harlem Berry scores for LSU to pull Tigers close
videos.description: Harlem Berry's 6-yard rush pulls LSU within five of Ole Miss in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Harlem Berry scores for LSU to pull Tigers close) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: PJ Woodland had an interception vs. Ole Miss
videos.description: PJ Woodland had an interception vs. Ole Miss

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (PJ Woodland had an interception vs. Ole Miss) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lane Kiffin relishes Ole Miss avenging last year's loss at LSU
videos.description: Kiffin touches on the Rebels' resilience and the home crowd's atmosphere while emphasizing how great it feels to get revenge from last year's loss to the Tigers in Baton Rouge.
